## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced by this Pull Request. 

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature or system component
- [ ] Update / optimization of an existing built-in application
- [ ] New files in LightOS added
- [ ] Documentation / cleanup

## Contribution Category & Licensing Agreement
- [ ] **Core System / Built-in App:** I understand that by submitting code to this repository, it will be fully source-available under the LightOS NCSA License. I confirm that I have not obscured or hidden any part of the submitted source code.
- [ ] **Attribution:** I have included proper attribution and copyright notices if required.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code compiles successfully on the target architecture(s).
- [ ] I have tested the changes under emulator (VirtualBox/QEMU) or hardware.
- [ ] I have updated the changelog in `info/UPDATES` with a complete list of changes.
- [ ] My code follows the established formatting style of the LightOS codebase.
